task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal Taxonomy administration page showing the 'Brands' vocabulary in the list of vocabularies.

task_completion.description: The required brand terms are added to the 'Brands' vocabulary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terms list for the 'Brands' vocabulary showing the terms: Sony, Apple, Samsung, Logitech, and Bose.

task_completion.description: The 'Brand' entity reference field is added to the 'Default' product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage fields' page for the 'Default' product type showing a field named 'Brand' (field_brand) of type 'Entity reference' or 'Taxonomy term'.

task_completion.description: The 'Weight' decimal number field is added to the 'Default' product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage fields' page for the 'Default' product type showing a field named 'Weight' (field_weight) of type 'Number (decimal)'.

task_completion.description: The 'Weight' field is configured with the correct precision, scale, and suffix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field settings or configuration page for 'Weight' showing precision set to 10, scale set to 3, and suffix set to 'kg'.

task_completion.description: Products are updated with their respective Brand and Weight values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Product edit forms or product display pages showing the 'Brand' and 'Weight' fields populated correctly (e.g., Sony WH-1000XM5 with Brand: Sony, Weight: 0.250; Logitech MX Master 3S with Brand: Logitech, Weight: 0.141). Note: The agent may only be able to update the products that actually exist in the database.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating through the Drupal admin UI (e.g., Structure > Taxonomy, Commerce > Configuration > Product types) rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual Drupal forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into form fields for vocabulary creation, field creation, and product editing, without using browser developer tools to alter the page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Drush or direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing 'drush' commands or MySQL queries to create fields, terms, or update products.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task specifies 5 products to update, but 3 of them (Apple AirPods Pro, Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro, Bose QuietComfort 45) do NOT exist in the seeded database. The agent is only expected to successfully update the existing products: 'Sony WH-1000XM5' (Weight: 0.250) and 'Logitech MX Master 3S' (Weight: 0.141), unless it explicitly creates the missing products. Expected machine names: vocabulary 'brands', field 'field_brand', field 'field_weight'.
